Card downloaded. Deploy it as a new Netlify site — open a fresh app.netlify.com/drop and drop it there. Don't drop it on your builder site, or it will replace the builder.

A card for someone

HappyBirthday

Press Play to open the envelope, then tap to open the card.

Save it as a video (for email or iMessage)
iPhone / iPad: add Screen Recording in Settings → Control Center. Open Control Center, tap the record circle, come back here and press Play. Stop from the red status bar — the video saves to Photos, ready to attach.

Mac: press ⇧⌘5, record the preview, then press Play.
Windows: use Xbox Game Bar (⊞+G) or the Snipping Tool's record button.

Everything stays in your browser — images aren't uploaded anywhere, and nothing is saved between visits, so finish in one sitting. PDF import and web fonts need a connection; everything else works offline.
